Lexer → parser → codegen, end to end. From scratch.</sub><br/><sub><i>parser is boring; codegen is where you learn how computers work</i></sub><br/><sub><code>Java · Compilers</code></sub> |
| <b><a href="https://github.com/TyronSamaroo/Palate">🍽️ Palate</a></b><br/><sub>Full-stack React app for food discovery. No third-party libs. Pure grit.</sub><br/><sub><i>constraint-driven projects are the fastest way to understand a stack</i></sub><br/><sub><code>Java · HTTP · Parsing</code></sub> |
| <b><a href="https://github.com/TyronSamaroo/SearchEngine">🔍 SearchEngine</a></b><br/><sub>Tiny search engine: indexing, ranking, query parser.</sub><br/><sub><i>classical ranking still beats cosine similarity for explainability</i></sub><br/><sub><code>JavaScript · IR</code></sub> | <b><a href="https://github.com/TyronSamaroo/Stock_App_Flask">📈 Stock_App_Flask</a></b><br/><sub>Flask stock tracker + portfolio views.
